description: Create a 'Polaroid-style' photo stack composition on Slide 2 using the images 'team_brainstorm.jpg', 'office_lunch.jpg', and 'design_review.jpg' from '~/Documents/Assets/'. Each image must be framed with a white rectangle, grouped with its frame, and rotated between -15 and +15 degrees. Arrange the resulting photo groups on Slide 2 in an overlapping, scattered pile.
